subject: An ornate gold filigree pendant locket held on a chain by partially visible fingers, containing a glowing red gemstone at its center
description: An extreme close-up of an intricately crafted gold filigree pendant or locket, suspended from a chain held by fingers barely visible at the top of the frame. The pendant's surface is covered in elaborate scrollwork and decorative metalwork. At its center, a large red gemstone or orb glows with internal light. Swirling ripple-like energy radiates outward from the pendant into the surrounding purple-pink background. The overall impression is of a beautiful but volatile object — the title 'Unstable' is well matched by the churning energy surrounding it.
foreground: The pendant itself, gold filigree detail, red gemstone
background: Swirling purple-pink energy radiating outward from the pendant
emotion: dangerous beauty; the elaborate craftsmanship contrasts with the unstable energy emanating from it
